name: Paylocity HCM & Payroll API
what_it_does: Paylocity REST API for Human Capital Management and payroll platform. Enables AI agents to manage employee records and HR data, handle payroll processing and tax compliance, access time and attendance management, retrieve benefits enrollment and administration data, manage performance management and review workflows, handle recruiting and applicant tracking, access learning and development data, retrieve compensation and salary data, manage onboarding and offboarding workflows, and integrate HCM data with accounting and enterprise systems.
use_cases: Managing employee records and HR data from HR automation agents
Processing payroll and tax compliance from payroll automation agents
Accessing time and attendance from workforce management agents
Integrating HCM data with accounting from payroll reconciliation agents
not_for: Large enterprise HCM requiring Workday or SAP SuccessFactors scale
International payroll without US-first payroll compliance focus
Professional employer organizations (PEO) without SMB HCM focus
best_when: A small-to-mid-size US employer using Paylocity wants AI agents to automate payroll processing, HR workflows, time tracking, benefits enrollment, performance management, and accounting integration.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Employee payroll and personal data is highly sensitive — SSN, banking, and compensation data. Automated payroll requires approval controls — errors affect employee pay. Benefits enrollment automation must be accurate — health insurance elections have annual deadlines. Compensation data is confidential.

auth.notes: Paylocity uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Company-level credentials with payroll, employee, and benefits scopes. Developer portal with API documentation. Webhooks for HR and payroll events. Marketplace integrations for benefits and ATS. Strong developer documentation.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — HCM subscription required
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-employee per-month pricing; modular HCM and payroll
pricing.notes: Schaumburg, Illinois. NASDAQ: PCTY. Founded 1997. Mid-market HCM and payroll platform. $1B+ annual revenue. Used by 38,000+ businesses with 5M+ employees. Strong US mid-market employer market. Community platform for employee engagement. Competes with Paycom and Paychex for mid-market HCM.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Employee SSN, banking, and compensation data — payroll data is highly sensitive
Automated payroll approval is critical — payroll errors directly affect employee pay
No public MCP server — well-documented OAuth2 REST API with developer portal
Benefits enrollment deadlines — automated enrollment must respect annual open enrollment windows
Compensation data is confidential — restrict access to authorized HR personnel
Payroll tax compliance automation must stay current with IRS and state tax law changes
agent_readiness.security_notes: Employee payroll and HR data. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2. US data residency. SSN and compensation sensitivity.

security_score_components.security_notes: Employee payroll data. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2. US data residency. SSN and banking data.
